transcript.content: 或者补一个 repo 内可重复的 smoke/eval case，把 GC-D2 收进固定回归
已经补进去了。 新回归 case 在： - [evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
已经修到全绿了。 我做了两件事： - 把 Codex minor GC 默认允许的 guarded relation 放宽到包含 `continue` - 把 `codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour` 收进固定 live eval case
继续扩 harder cases，把类似 GC-B 的自然中文多轮切题也收进固定回归

已经把 harder case 补进固定回归了。 新增 case： - `codex-minor-gc-zh-dense-multitopic-return` - 文件：[evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
要；尽量不是白名单，有硬编码嫌疑；
已经收住了，而且不是靠白名单。 我做了两步： - 把中文多轮切题 harder case 收进固定回归 - 再把 packaged guard 收紧成“不能覆盖 shadow guard 的否决”
那刚才不通过的测试，可以重新测试，预期是可以通过了对么？
能自动跑的，你帮我跑一遍

decision.archive_summary: The prior thread about adding and hardening codex minor GC live eval regressions appears completed: a repeatable smoke/eval case was added, guarded relation handling was adjusted to include continue, Chinese multi-turn harder cases were added to fixed regression coverage, and the packaged guard was tightened to avoid whitelist-like behavior. The final user request was to rerun the previously failing automated test, and the assistant reported it had been run via the live eval script.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active request in this slice was the automated rerun of a previously failing test after the regression and guard changes. By the end, the assistant stated it had already run the command, so the earlier implementation and expectation-setting turns are resolved status/history, not needed as raw prompt context for the next turn. There are no strong durable user facts or preferences here that need semantic pinning beyond the normal session log, so the working set can shrink to the latest user turn plus whatever the runtime already retains.
